name: Terry Richardson

acts.description: Dozens of models and subjects accused him of coercive sexual behavior during shoots, using professional power to exploit

behavior_summary: Multiple models accused him of coercive sexual behavior during shoots, treating access to his lens as a transactional currency. Major fashion houses and publications eventually distanced themselves.

art.summary: Defined an era of snapshot-style fashion photography. His aesthetic is everywhere, now largely stripped of his name.

verdict.blurb: His entire aesthetic was the exploitation: the point of the photos was that the subjects were uncomfortable and he had the power. The art and the abuse were the same thing.
